description: Bubble point calculation for C1-C4 binary at 280K

expected.notes: PR76 with kij=0 at 280K. Self-consistent output of the repo's bubble-point solver (both the Newton fast path and the TPD+Brent bracket path converge to this value across all initial-guess seeds). The prior stored value (10528266 Pa) matched the Wilson-K ideal-K approximation sum(z_i * Pc_i * exp(5.373*(1+omega_i)*(1-Tc_i/T))), not the full cubic EOS; the cubic's answer is lower because C1-nC4 non-idealities reduce C1's effective volatility in the liquid phase.
